entities.name: INTERNATIONAL CHICKPEA AND PIGEONPEA NEWSLETTER
entities.description: An annual publication by ICRISAT that serves as a worldwide communication link for research and development of chickpea, pigeonpea, and their wild relatives.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The organization that publishes the International Chickpea and Pigeonpea Newsletter.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., a crop of interest for research and development reported in the ICPN.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp., a crop of interest for research and development reported in the ICPN.

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES
entities.description: Wild species related to chickpea and pigeonpea that are subjects of research and development.
